# Samuel & Audrey YouTube Transcripts EN Corpus, 2012–2026

This dataset contains 1,397 full English YouTube transcript records and 233,285 cue-level transcript segment records from the Samuel and Audrey channel.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/samuel-and-audrey-youtube-transcripts-en

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665704

YouTube channel:
https://youtube.com/@samuelandaudrey

Recommended files:
- samuel-and-audrey-youtube-transcripts-en.jsonl
- samuel-and-audrey-youtube-transcripts-en.csv
- samuel-and-audrey-youtube-transcripts-en_segments.jsonl
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 1,397 youtube_transcript records
- 233,285 youtube_transcript_segment records

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
